import React from 'react' const Card = ({ service }) => { function getDate(date) { } return (
Service Type : { ` ${service.serviceType}` }
Duration : { ` ${service.duration} month` }
Price : { ` ₹ ${service.price}` }
Payment Id : {service.refrence_id}
Booking Date : {service.booking_date}
) } export default Card
